g.text: Client-side router · classifies intent · dispatches to specialists in parallel · synthesizes a unified answer
PYTHON FLASK PROXY · SSE STREAMING · ENTRA ID AUTH
server.py — handles auth, proxies to Fabric Data Agent OpenAI-compatible API, streams Server-Sent Events to the browser
All queries flow through semantic views — abstraction layer that makes Snowflake migration painless
Stable query contract — agents never touch raw tables
Swap underlying tables → app, agents, UX unchanged
Star schema · feeds Data Agents AND Power BI
~2.8M rows synthetic data · production path to Snowflake
Delta · SQL analytics endpoint · DirectLake mode
